title: Surface area of luck
html:
Surface area of luck — Yahir's framing for why he moves to bigger cities, takes risks, attends events, and refuses to optimize for safety. "Why are we moving to Austin. To increase our surface area of luck."

Origin in vault

  • First explicit use: May 2025 Austin move plan — "To increase our surface area of luck. For business, for women, for our life fulfillment."
  • Predecessor concept: June 2022 fish tank principle — "Fish will only grow to the size of its tank."
  • Echo in Sept 2025 arrival: "This is a game, this entire thing feels like a game. Make it to the top, have fun doing it, survive the potholes and fear nothing."

Mechanism

Surface-area-of-luck = the more events / people / contexts you put yourself in, the more chances for serendipity. Geography matters because density matters. Austin > Corvallis because more pickleball clubs + more agencies + more potential partners + more potential lynchpin candidates.

Same logic applies to:

  • Travel — Yahir's China chapter was a luck-surface-area expansion.
  • Events — going to crypto meetups, business networking, gym tournaments.
  • Cold outreach — Diddles printing 4000 leads = manufacturing luck-surface-area at scale.
